system.description:
Basic Discipline Technique. Three applications:
Lift/Move: Any object up to 10 kg × Psy Rating may be moved slowly within range. Cannot be used as a direct attack. Does not work on living beings.
Throw: Objects up to 5 kg × Psy Rating may be hurled. BS Test to hit; damage = 1d10 Impact + 1 per 5 kg of weight.
Shove: Sharp wave of force. Opposed Willpower vs. target's Strength. If the psyker wins, the target is knocked to the ground and pushed away a number of metres equal to Psy Rating.

Focus Power Test: Willpower / Opposed Willpower
